description_long: This object is a stylized blue flower with multiple blossoms emerging from a central, upright stem. The main flower head is large and rounded, composed of densely packed petals, while several smaller buds and blooms are attached to branching stems below. The stems are slender and angular, with a geometric, almost crystalline appearance, and the base tapers to a point, giving the impression of being rooted in midair or on a floating platform. The petals are layered and somewhat ruffled, creating a textured, voluminous look. The entire structure is rendered in a deep, uniform blue, with no visible leaves or additional coloration. The overall form is vertical and elongated, with the flowers positioned at varying heights along the main stem.
description: A stylized, deep blue flower with multiple blossoms on a tall, angular stem and a pointed base, featuring densely layered petals and a striking, geometric form.
description_view_0: The main flower head and several smaller blooms are visible, with the pointed base and branching stems clearly seen.
description_view_1: A direct view of the central stem, showing the alignment of the blossoms and the vertical structure of the plant.
description_view_2: The largest flower head is prominent, with the branching stems and smaller blooms extending backward, emphasizing the layered arrangement.
description_view_3: A side view highlighting the main blossom and the angular, pointed base, with smaller blooms partially obscured.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial configuration, forming a rounded, layered head with overlapping and ruffled edges, typical of composite or double flowers.
